SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

javax.media.mscontrol
Interface MediaSession

All Superinterfaces:
MediaObject
public interface MediaSession
extends MediaObject

A MediaSession is a container and factory for media objects. It handles the cleanup on release().

Field Summary
static Parameter TIMEOUT
          The value of this Parameter is an Integer, in milliseconds, after which an API call (on the objects created by this MediaSession) should timeout.
 
Fields inherited from interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaObject
MEDIAOBJECT_ID

createParameters, getMediaObjects, getMediaObjects, getParameters, getURI, release, setParameters
 

Field Detail

TIMEOUT

static final Parameter TIMEOUT
The value of this Parameter is an Integer, in milliseconds, after which an API call (on the objects created by this MediaSession) should timeout.
This can be caused in particular by lengthy/failing call to a remote media server.
The API call will throw TimeoutException in this case.

Method Detail

createNetworkConnection

NetworkConnection createNetworkConnection(Configuration<NetworkConnection> predefinedConfig)
                                          throws MsControlException
Create a NetworkConnection.

Parameters:
predefinedConfig - Defines the set of resources in the NetworkConnection, and their arrangement.
See NetworkConnection for the list of predefined Configurations.
Returns:
a NetworkConnection
Throws:
MsControlException

createNetworkConnection

NetworkConnection createNetworkConnection(Configuration<NetworkConnection> predefinedConfig,
                                          Parameters params)
                                          throws MsControlException
Create a NetworkConnection.

Parameters:
predefinedConfig - Defines the set of resources in the NetworkConnection, and their arrangement.
See NetworkConnection for the list of predefined Configurations.
params - customization parameters, like MediaObject.MEDIAOBJECT_ID.
Returns:
a NetworkConnection
Throws:
MsControlException

createNetworkConnection

NetworkConnection createNetworkConnection(MediaConfig config,
                                          Parameters params)
                                          throws MsControlException
Create a NetworkConnection.

Parameters:
config - Defines the set of resources in the NetworkConnection, and their arrangement.
This MediaConfig may not be predefined. See MsControlFactory.getMediaConfig(Configuration) and MsControlFactory.getMediaConfig(java.io.Reader) to obtain a MediaConfig.
params - customization parameters, like MediaObject.MEDIAOBJECT_ID.
Returns:
a NetworkConnection
Throws:
MsControlException

createVxmlDialog

VxmlDialog createVxmlDialog(Parameters parameters)
                            throws MsControlException
A VxmlDialog is a Joinable object that can interpret a vxml script

Parameters:
parameters -
Throws:
java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the session has been released
MsControlException

getAttribute

java.lang.Object getAttribute(java.lang.String name)
Return the object associated to a name from this session.

Parameters:
name - of the object

removeAttribute

void removeAttribute(java.lang.String name)
Removes the object associated to a name from this session.

Parameters:
name - name of the associated object

setAttribute

void setAttribute(java.lang.String name,
                  java.lang.Object attribute)
Set an object to this session for a given name.

Parameters:
name - bound name
attribute - bound attribute

getAttributeNames

java.util.Iterator<java.lang.String> getAttributeNames()
Returns an Iterator on the names of all the objects associated to this session.
Note: calling remove() on the returned Iterator will result in an UnsupportedOperationException.

Returns:
Iterator of name
